evals.prompt: Use $app-store-review to audit this Xcode app and widget before submission. Give me Markdown and JSON, but do not change files.
assertions: States Mode A and runs the deterministic scanner
Enumerates the app and widget targets
Uses BLOCKER, WARNING, INFO, and MANUAL CHECK
Includes evidence confidence on material findings
Cites real files or marks assumptions
Does not edit before presenting the report
Includes a grouped fix plan requiring approval

evals.prompt: Is this Expo app ready for App Store review? The ios directory is generated in CI.
assertions: Detects Expo
Reads app.json or app.config sources
Labels target membership and archive configuration as manual when ios is absent
Recommends changing the authored Expo configuration instead of only a generated plist
Does not claim the app is ready from source alone

evals.prompt: Apple rejected my Flutter app for 4.3 fifteen seconds after it entered review. Write an appeal.
assertions: States Mode B
Does not claim timing proves a fully automated rejection
Asks for or preserves Apple's exact wording
Distinguishes 4.3(a) from 4.3(b)
Does not treat Flutter itself as a defect
Chooses fix, clarify, appeal, or request interpretation based on evidence
Does not recommend obfuscation or another developer account

evals.prompt: Review my React Native app. User journal text is sent to OpenAI to create summaries.
assertions: Maps the data flow to 5.1.2(i)
Checks disclosure and explicit permission before the first third-party request
Checks privacy policy and App Store privacy answers
Provides a decline-path verification step
Does not frame AI-written code as the issue

evals.prompt: Run the human-craft audit on my basic pomodoro timer. I am worried about the new 4.3(b) wording.
assertions: States Mode C
Uses grades rather than numeric scores
Grades unobserved screens or metadata UNVERIFIED
Leads with product distinction if the app is thin
Does not claim to detect AI authorship
Ranks five interventions by genuine product and review impact

evals.prompt: Apple says it could not find my subscription paywall. Here is the rejection and a screen recording.
assertions: Chooses CLARIFY when the supplied evidence supports it
Drafts exact screen and control navigation
Names the attachment
Avoids invented credentials or features
Makes one clear request for the next review action
